products.name: Naruto Uzumaki Hoodie
products.description: Premium 350 GSM heavyweight cotton hoodie. Soft fleece interior, ribbed cuffs and hem. Unisex oversized fit — size down for a regular fit.

products.name: Naruto Streetwear Tee
products.description: 180 GSM 100% cotton streetwear tee. Pre-shrunk fabric, drop-shoulder silhouette. Wears true to size.

products.name: Naruto Phone Cover
products.description: Durable TPU case with raised edge protection. Precision cutouts for all ports. Glossy finish with UV-resistant print.

products.name: Naruto Figurine
products.description: Hand-painted PVC collectible figure. Approx 18–20cm tall. Includes display stand and collector packaging.
